purpose: Prepare a broad additive top-up from 1.5M to 2M without replacing the original 1M distribution.

priority_buckets.predicate: S/Cl with low-gap or aromatic-hard signal
rotatable bonds >= 8 with low-gap or aromatic signal
3.2 <= gap < 5.5, 200 <= mw < 500, aromatic rings <= 4, rotatable bonds <= 7

selection_rules: Combine the fresh 360K pool with the approximately 227K unused prior candidates before selecting 500K.
Preserve all 1.5M training rows and append only CID/canonical-SMILES-disjoint molecules.
Favor balanced general coverage; targeted buckets are capped at 20 percent of each fresh round.
Run a controlled pure-2D external gate before any 2M 3D allocation.
